Blog Image Review — Ilaaj AI, July 2026 Batch

50 of 51 targets sourced from Pexels (free, no-attribution license). 1 flagged — see Condition posts. Review each card, then approve for upload to the S3 key blog/{slug}.jpg.

daad-ringworm-ka-ilaj
Ringworm (daad) fungal skin infection
